description: You are a senior IT support specialist completing end-of-week housekeeping. Resolve and close Ticket 1002 (email account issue) with the resolution: 'Investigated mail server configuration. Found SMTP relay settings were changed during last maintenance window. Reverted SMTP settings to prior configuration: smtp.company.local port 587 with TLS. Confirmed fix by sending test emails from 5 accounts.' Resolve the Adobe Acrobat Pro installation request ticket with the resolution: 'Adobe Acrobat Pro DC license provisioned via company software portal. Installation completed remotely via SCCM push. User confirmed application is working and PDF editing is accessible.' Create a Knowledge Base solution article in the Solutions module titled 'Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows' describing the SMTP relay fix as a known solution.

metadata.kb_title: Troubleshooting SMTP Email Issues After Maintenance Windows
